narrative:
Precinct Vermilion City 3-A/5-A (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,245 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
